revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}}{{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}}{{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

revision.comment: moving the draft templates above the comments
revision.text: {{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}}{{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

revision.comment: redoing the same process but also removing the [[User:Immanuelle/Promising Draft]] template
revision.text: {{draft}} {{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}} {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}}{{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

revision.comment: fixing multiple templates on one line glitch by adding line breaks between adjacent templates
Text replacement - "{{Promising draft|reason=the high amount of work put into it over a long time, see edit history}}" to "{{Promising draft}}"

Text replacement - "{{Promising draft}}" to "[[Category:Completion tier 7]]<!--all this actually mandates is a completion tier 7 ranking. We are not using the promising draft template here. If I get anywhere near implementing it, I will do so based on the actual completion tiers of this wiki rather than whether I added them when they were on simple english wikipedia or wherever-->"
revision.text: {{draft}} [[Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

{{draft}} [[sn:Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

[[sn:Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: [[sn:Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

[[sn:Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: [[sn:Category:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
revision.text: [[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:Completion tier 7]] {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk page header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk page header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23991619004|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]]. If this template is put on an article by mistake, the article will be categorized in [[:Category:Misused Promising draft template]]. == Notes == A [[Special:PermanentLink/848304259#Request for comment: Promising drafts|request for comment]] in June 2018 closed with a consensus that the {{tl|promising draft}} template "cannot be used to indefinitely prevent a [[WP:G13]] speedy deletion nomination". == See also == *[[WP:G13 soon]] *{{tl|Highly wanted draft}} - for drafts whose title is the target of a significant number of [[WP:RED|red links]] already in main article space. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Draft namespace templates]] [[Category:Promising draft articles|-]] [[Category:Talk page header templates]] [[Category:Under-construction templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template should be placed on drafts by editors other than the original draft creator to indicate that the draft has promise and is worthy of more significant review and discussion prior to deletion in order to avoid losing valuable encyclopedia content. == Usage == {{tlc|Promising draft}} {{br}} {{tlc|Promising draft|reason{{=}}''your reason here''}} == Parameters == * {{para|reason}} – add "because ..." phrase to the message text, with the value of the param replacing the ellipsis (the word "because" is already included in the template). ==Examples== {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}}: {{Promising draft|reason=dozens of red links point to this title}} == Categorization == Such drafts are categorized within [[:Category:Promising draft articles]].
